mapper.select: SELECT * FROM ( SELECT faq_id, title, content, category, view_count FROM FAQS WHERE fk_hotel_id = #{hotelId} ORDER BY view_count DESC ) WHERE ROWNUM <= 5

SELECT count(*) FROM QUESTIONS WHERE fk_hotel_id = #{hotelId}
AND (title LIKE '%'||#{searchKeyword}||'%' OR content LIKE '%'||#{searchKeyword}||'%')

SELECT Q.qna_id, Q.title, Q.content, Q.writer_name, Q.status, Q.is_secret, Q.fk_hotel_id, TO_CHAR(Q.created_at, 'yyyy-mm-dd HH24:mi') AS q_date, A.content AS ans_content, TO_CHAR(A.created_at, 'yyyy-mm-dd HH24:mi') AS a_date FROM QUESTIONS Q LEFT JOIN ANSWERS A ON Q.qna_id = A.qna_id WHERE Q.qna_id = #{qnaId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO QUESTIONS ( QNA_ID, FK_HOTEL_ID, TITLE, CONTENT, WRITER_NAME, IS_SECRET, STATUS, CREATED_AT ) VALUES ( SEQ_QNA_ID.nextval, #{fk_hotel_id}, #{title}, #{content}, #{writer_name}, #{is_secret}, 'WAITING', SYSDATE )
